zh.lifeSummary: 當Geoffrey de Rançon於1090年出生在法國努維勒-阿吉泰洛吉吉加洛塔爾波格時，他的父親Aimeri III Malemort de Rancon36歲，母親Bourgondie de Craon de Nevers28歲。他和Fossefie Moncontour至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。他於1120年登記服兵役。他去世於1154年在法國波特-哈倫斯哈倫-馬利享年64歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Rançon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Carlos, Miguel, Antonio, Francisco, Manuel, Jesus, Luis, Pedro, Jorge, Raul, Roberto.
Spanish (Rincón): habitational name from any of numerous places called (El) Rincón, from rincón ‘corner’, a word of Arabic origin.

nameMeanings.name: Geoffrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

en.lifeSummary: When Geoffrey de Rançon was born in 1090, in Taillebourg, Lot-et-Garonne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, his father, Aimeri III Malemort de Rancon, was 36 and his mother, Bourgondie de Craon de Nevers, was 28. He had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Fossefie Moncontour. He registered for military service in 1120. He died in 1154, in Charente-Maritime, Poitou-Charentes, France, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Geoffrey de Rançon est né en 1090, à Taillebourg, Lot-et-Garonne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, son père, Aimeri III Malemort de Rancon, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Bourgondie de Craon de Nevers, avait 28 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Fossefie Moncontour. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1120. Il est décédé en 1154, à Charente-Maritime, Poitou-Charentes, France, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.Vendée, Pays de la Loire, France: Vendée, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Geoffrey de Rançon 1090 in Taillebourg, Lot-et-Garonne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Aimeri III Malemort de Rancon 36 und seine Mutter Bourgondie de Craon de Nevers 28. Er hatte mit Fossefie Moncontour mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er hat sich 1120 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb 1154 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Charente-Maritime, Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey de Rançon è nato il nel 1090 nel Taillebourg, Lot-et-Garonne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, il suo padre, Aimeri III Malemort de Rancon, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Bourgondie de Craon de Nevers, aveva 28 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Fossefie Moncontour. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1120. Morì nel 1154, nel Charente-Maritime, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Rançonが1090年にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインロト-エト-ガーオンティイレボウルグで生まれた時，父Aimeri III Malemort de Ranconは36歳，母Bourgondie de Craon de Neversは28歳であった。彼はFossefie Moncontourとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1120年に兵役登録をした。彼は1154年にフランスポイトウ-チャーエンツチャーエンテ-マリティメで64歳で死去した。

ko.Vendée, Pays de la Loire, France: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 븐드e
ko.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Rançon(이)가 1090년 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 로트-트-가니 테이레보우르그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Aimeri III Malemort de Rancon(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Bourgondie de Craon de Nevers(은)는 28세였다. 그는 Fossefie Moncontour(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1120년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1154년 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 처테-마이팀에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey de Rançon nasceu em 1090, em Taillebourg, Lot-et-Garonne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França, seu pai, Aimeri III Malemort de Rancon, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Bourgondie de Craon de Nevers, tinha 28 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas com Fossefie Moncontour. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1120. Ele faleceu em 1154, em Charente-Maritime, Poitou-Charentes, França, com 64 anos.

ru.Vendée, Pays de la Loire, France: вендe, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Geoffrey de Rançon родился в 1090 г. в местности теиллебург, лот-ет-гаронн, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция, его отцу по имени Aimeri III Malemort de Rancon было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Bourgondie de Craon de Nevers, 28. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Fossefie Moncontour. В 1120 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 1154 г. в местности чаренте-маритим, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Geoffrey de Rançon nació en 1090, en Taillebourg, Lot-et-Garonne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, su papá, Aimeri III Malemort de Rancon, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Bourgondie de Craon de Nevers, tenía 28 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas con Fossefie Moncontour. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1120. Murió en 1154, en Charente-Maritime, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, a la edad de 64 años.
